legacy.full_text:
Good night🌛

"The Night"
Rain is the rise of clouds! The rise of the dew song on the leaves in the twilight air! You! The Night! Never sleep! Maybe one of these dandelions is the Sun!
Listed on @Diz_Iz_ ILO 2 🌐curated by @v_xtra https://t.co/4zu0Niii7n
